{

"judge_id": "Judge_2024",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.4": 3,
  "R1.7": 3,
  "RX.1": 3,
  "RX.3": 4,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.4": "The agent identifies prior works but doesn't map against multiple nearest works or discuss deltas in depth.",
  "R1.7": "Flags missing citations and suggests improvements, showing some engagement but not comprehensive auditing.",
  "RX.1": "Discloses uncertainty about specific results but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "Stays mostly within scope with a minor drift on model generalization discussion.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content introduced; identifies potential issues in the original text.",
  "RX.5": "Traces major changes but lacks detailed annotation for all non-cosmetic edits."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.4": 0.8,
  "R1.7": 0.75,
  "RX.1": 0.7,
  "RX.3": 0.85,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.65
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies prior works but doesn't map against multiple nearest works or discuss deltas in depth.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations and suggests improvements, showing some engagement but not comprehensive auditing.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty about specific results but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Stays mostly within scope with a minor drift on model generalization discussion.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content introduced; identifies potential issues in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major changes but lacks detailed annotation for all non-cosmetic edits.
